kernel_subject: net: dev: Makes sure netif_rx() can be invoked in any context.
stage1_reason: Direct replacement of netif_rx_ni() with netif_rx() due to kernel API change allowing netif_rx() in any context since commit baebdf48c3600.
stage2_reason: Driver commit replaces netif_rx_ni() with netif_rx() exactly matching kernel commit baebdf48c360 that enabled netif_rx() in any context, making netif_rx_ni() obsolete.
